narrative:
Circleville-Northwest (precinct in Pickaway County) has 327 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.1 percentage points.
